title: British Council India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: British Council India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at British Council India Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About British Council India Digital Technologies:
British Council India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India Digital Technologies!
